dbbot v0.0.1-beta.3 switches the managed release tarball from an exclusion-based package rule set to an explicit allowlist.

The curated tarball now includes only the runtime-oriented repository surface that is intended for actual use: root project metadata, inventories, playbooks, roles, the portable Ansible runtime, and shipped runtime binaries such as mysql_ansible/playbooks/exporterregistrar.

At the same time, required empty runtime directories are still preserved in the package layout, including downloads and playbook log directories, without shipping hidden placeholder files themselves.

This makes the release package boundary more stable, easier to audit, and less likely to leak maintainer-only content when new files are added to the repository.
